docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-26-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-08-2021 AT 3:30 P.M. TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO TIMELY FILE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM AND AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NANCI WILLIAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FERNANDA CADAMBI (EMPLOYEE). DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR SC-109 FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAM, NANCI
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAM, NANCI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $5,503.79 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,593.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAM, NANCI
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM IS GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,103.79 FILED BY WILLIAM, NANCI AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM, NANCI AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-08-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NANCI WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF STATES TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT HAD SENT COMMUNICATION BY EMAIL STATING THAT AIRBNB INTENDED TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FOR TODAYS HEARING. COURT HAS NOT RECEIVED A REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM AT THE TIME THIS MATTER CAME ON CALENDAR. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS HAVE BEEN RECIEVED AND PLACED WITH THE COURT FILE. TELEPHONE NUMBER 971-990-5276 WAS PRESENT ON ZOOM AFTER COURT PROCEEDING BEGAN. THIS NUMBER DID NOT OPEN UP AUDIO DURING THE TIME THAT THIS MATTER WAS BEING DISCUSSED. COURT CONTINUES THIS MATTER TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO PROPERLY FILE ZOOM REQUEST. AFTER THE MATTER CONCLUDED, THE NUMBER ON ZOOM WAS NO LONGER PRESENT. I CALLED THE NUMBER LISTED AND SPOKE TO FERNANDA CADAMBI, LEGAL INVESTIGATOR FOR AIRBNB. SHE STATED THAT SHE WAS HAVING TECHNICAL DIFFICULTY LOGGING INTO ZOOM, WHICH IS WHY SHE CALLED IN. SHE STATES THAT SHE HEARD THE PROCEEDING AND THE NEW DATE. DEFENDANT WAS INFORMED THAT THIS IS THE FINAL SETTING AND THAT THE MATTER WILL GO FORWARD, EVEN IF DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -FERNANDA CADAMBI TO APPEAR FOR AIRBNB, INC FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2021 - JUDGMENT.
